name: Battery
author: Martin Macak
description: A modern, themeable, responsive battery for a numeric level / state-of-charge datapoint. Six pre-built themes (vertical, horizontal, segment vertical/horizontal, ring, minimal) that scale to fit the cell; a smooth fill, an auto-detected charging shimmer, a low-battery pulse, threshold colours, and per-theme design (frame, glow, segment count, ring thickness) — all in Appearance. Reference Dashboard Widget package.
